title: GeminiAnalysisOutput
description: Machine-parseable threat analysis result returned by Gemini (Google AI) engine. Schema version 1.0.0 — do not modify field names or types without bumping schemaVersion and getting sign-off from the AI Engineering lead.

schemaVersion.description: Semver string identifying the output contract version.

analysedAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp at which the analysis was produced.

threatScore.description: Overall threat risk score. Range: 0.00 (no threat) to 10.00 (maximum severity).

confidence.description: Model self-reported confidence in the analysis. Range: 0.00 to 1.00.

threatType.description: Primary threat category identified in the evidence.

evidenceCitations.description: Ordered list of evidence items that influenced the verdict. Must have at least one entry when threatScore > 0.

source.description: Human-readable label for the evidence source.

rationale.description: Why this evidence is relevant to the verdict.

excerpt.description: Optional verbatim snippet from the source (≤ 500 chars).

reportSummary.description: Executive-level summary for inclusion in a security report. Plain text, 50–500 characters.
